content.scenarioHint: 你在图书馆借完书后，想确认一下借阅规则和归还日期，然后礼貌告别。
expectedAnswers: Just to confirm, I can keep these books for three weeks and renew them online if needed, right?
Can I double-check—these books are due in 21 days, and I can borrow up to 10 at a time?
So, to make sure I got it right: three-week loan, online renewal allowed, and no late fees if I return on time?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确确认了借阅规则和归还期限
语言准确性：语法正确，使用了恰当的确认句式（如 'Just to confirm', 'Can I double-check'）
表达自然度：语气礼貌，符合日常英语口语习惯
关键词覆盖：使用了 'confirm', 'due', 'renew', 'loan' 等场景关键词

content.speakerText: Just to make sure—I can use the gym until 10 PM, and I don't need to reserve a slot in advance, right?
content.speakerTextCn: 我确认一下——我可以使用健身房到晚上10点，而且不需要提前预约，对吗？
expectedAnswers: Yes, that's correct. You're all set!
Yep, no reservation needed. Enjoy your workout!
Absolutely! The gym is open until 10 PM for all students.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：准确确认所有信息点（开放时间、无需预约）
语言准确性：使用正确动词搭配（be open until, need to reserve）
表达自然度：使用口语化确认词（yes, yup, absolutely）并自然结尾
